comment: Gzipped JS bytes shipped per route (every <script src='/_astro/*.js'> in dist/<route>/index.html). Ceiling = round_up(actual × 1.2, 1024). The gate intentionally measures only eagerly-loaded JS — chunks behind dynamic import() (canvas, tones, gallery-save) live below the fold and have their own implicit budget governed by IntersectionObserver gating. Update ceilings explicitly in the same commit as the regression, with a one-line rationale in the commit body.
